case_names: In Re: The Rules of Civil Procedure
summaries: In Re: The Rules of Civil Procedure; Disposition: The Mississippi Rules of Civil Procedure's Introductory Statement for Appendix A Forms is amended as set forth in the attached Exhibit A. The amendments are effective upon this order's entry. Agree: King and Coleman, P.JJ., Maxwell, Chamberlin, Ishee, Griffis, Sullivan and Branning, JJ. Disagree: Randolph, C.J. Order entered 11/12/25.

case_names: In Re: Rules of Professional Conduct
summaries: In Re: Rules of Professional Conduct; Disposition: Petition to Amend Certain Rules of the Mississippi Rules of Appellate Procedure and the Mississippi Rules of Professional Conduct in Order to Define the Practice of Law in Mississippi and Exceptions Thereto and to Prohibit the Unauthorized Practice of Law in Mississippi is granted in part. Rule 8.5 of the Mississippi Rules of Professional Conduct is amended as set forth in Exhibit A. The amendment shall take effect on July 1, 2026. All Justices Agree. Order entered 11/13/25.

In Re: Local Rules; Disposition: Motion to Amend or in the Alternative, Adopt Local Rule filed by Tomika H. Irving, Circuit Court Judge for the Twenty-Third Circuit Court District of Mississippi is granted. Local Rule 1 for the Twenty-Third Circuit Court District of Mississippi, attached as Exhibit A, is approved and effective upon entry of this Order. All Justices Agree. Order entered 11/12/25.

In Re: Local Rules; Disposition: Motion to Amend the Local Rules for the Fourth Circuit filed by the Circuit Court Judges for the Fourth Circuit Court District of Mississippi is granted. Those local rules for the Fourth Circuit Court District of Mississippi, attached as Exhibit A, are approved and effective upon entry of this Order. All Justices Agree. Order entered 11/12/25.

In Re: Local Rules; Disposition: Motion for Approval of Proposed Local Rule for the Circuit Court of the 18th Judicial District filed by Dal Williamson, Circuit Court Judge for the Eighteenth Circuit Court District of Mississippi, is granted. Local Rule 5 for the Eighteenth Circuit Court District of Mississippi, attached as Exhibit A, is approved and effective upon entry of this Order. All Justices Agree. Order entered 11/12/25.

case_names: Hattiesburg Medical Park Management Corp., Bedford Care Center of Mendenhall, LLC, Bedford Care Center Monroe Hall, LLC, Bedford Alzheimer's Care Center, LLC, Bedford Care Center of Newton, LLC, Bedford Care Center of Petal, LLC, Bedford Care Center of Hattiesburg, LLC and Bedford Care Center of Marion, LLC v. Mississippi Division of Medicaid and Cindy Bradshaw, In Her Official Capacity as Executive Director of Mississippi Division of Medicaid
summaries: Hattiesburg Medical Park Management Corp., Bedford Care Center of Mendenhall, LLC, Bedford Care Center Monroe Hall, LLC, Bedford Alzheimer's Care Center, LLC, Bedford Care Center of Newton, LLC, Bedford Care Center of Petal, LLC, Bedford Care Center of Hattiesburg, LLC and Bedford Care Center of Marion, LLC v. Mississippi Division of Medicaid and Cindy Bradshaw, In Her Official Capacity as Executive Director of Mississippi Division of Medicaid; Hinds Chancery Court 1st District; LC Case : 25CH1:22-cv-01011; Ruling Date: 02/21/2024; Ruling Judge: Tiffany Grove; Majority Opinion: Griffis, J. Disposition: Reversed and Rendered. Appellees taxed with costs of appeal. Votes: Randolph, C.J., Maxwell, Chamberlin, Ishee, Sullivan and Branning, JJ., Concur. King, P.J., Dissents With Separate Written Opinion Joined by Coleman, P.J. Dissenting Opinion: King, P.J. Votes: Coleman, P.J., Joins This Opinion.
